name: Orpheus
bio:
Former Rock Youth who accidentally became a zombie. He uses a guitar and music to wield dark power, protecting humans from evil forces.

Role: AOE Counterattack
Specialty: A front-midline Breakthrough-type hero that can counterattack with AOE skills when taking active attacks; deals extra True Damage based on the number of Corrosion effects on the target. Can also apply Heal Reduction to lower the target's received healing.

skillSlots.name: Improv Performance
skillSlots.description: Deals 80% P.DMG to all enemies, dealing additional P.DMG equal to 5% of Max HP to [Infect] targets (cannot exceed 100% of own ATK).

skillSlots.name: Death Rock
skillSlots.description: Deals 420% P.DMG to single enemy target, ignoring 30% DEF.

effects.name: Rock Rhythm
effects.description: 50% chance to cast [Improv Performance] (50% reduced DMG) on all enemies when hit by Enemy Hero's active attack (triggers once per turn max).

effects.name: Rock Rhythm
effects.description: Gains 1 stack of [Zeal] per [Improv Performance] cast.

effects.name: Rock Rhythm
effects.description: [Death Rock] deals additional P.DMG equal to 25% of target's lost HP (max 500% of caster's ATK).

effects.name: Rock Rhythm
effects.description: Increases [Improv Performance] trigger limit to 2 times per turn when hit.
